steps.title: Find the larger radius
steps.content:
Container B has a radius $25\%$ longer than container A. Since container A has radius $12$,
$$r=12+0.25(12)=12+3=15$$

steps.title: Use cylinder volume
steps.content:
The volume of a cylinder is $V=\pi r^2h$. Use $r=15$ and $h=60$.
$$V=\pi(15)^2(60)=\pi(225)(60)=13{,}500\pi$$
The answer is B.
